rationale: depth(phi) is a function on wffs (def:well-formed-formula) defined by recursion on formula structure; well-definedness is the structural-recursion principle (thm:structural-recursion). def:parse-tree removed for the same reason as 0110 (sibling construct, not a basis).
notes: Same recursive-definition consistency fix as 0110; aligns with the def:formula-variable-set template (0112). depth = parse-tree height intuitively, so if parse-tree is the intended conceptual anchor the reviewer can restore it.
